### Props

| Name          | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `item`        | `object`  |          | `null`  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `formData`    | `object`  |          | `\{\}`  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `extraRows`   | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Additional `[label, value]` rows appended to (or, when `replaceRows` is true, replacing) the default ID/Created/Updated rows. Use this to surface domain-specific metadata (version, owner, custom timestamps, etc.). |
| `replaceRows` | `boolean` |          | `false` | When true, render only `extraRows` and skip the default ID/Created/Updated rows.                                                                                                                                      |
